_meta.basis: Pokemon Crystal (Gen 2), pokecrystal ROM disassembly (johto_grass.asm + johto_water.asm); rarity = best morn/day/nite slot chance via grass[30,30,20,10,5,4,1]/water[60,30,10]
_meta.schema: location -> {name, type, catchable:[{dexNumber, name, method, version, rarityTier, minLevel, maxLevel, catchRate, catchRateExempt}]}
excluded: Mt. Silver / Silver Cave (Kanto-border postgame, not Johto-graph adjacent)
